div.p: Work-stealing victim selection algorithm with PRNG

ul.li: Random distribution via LCG prevents synchronized contention
Self-exclusion prevents stealing from own queue
Round-robin fallback ensures all queues eventually tried
Statistics track success rate for monitoring

div.p: PRNG Update (LCG) rust state = state * 6364136223846793005 + 1442695040888963407 victim = (state as usize) % num_workers
